message:
refactor: Convert final 22 *_mod.zig files to comptime genConst pattern

Batch 25 (final): ast, lzma, readline, telnetlib, pkgutil, sysconfig,
optparse, concurrent_futures, sqlite3, urllib_request, idlelib, symtable,
turtle, typing_extensions, winsound, wsgiref, msvcrt, xmlrpc, webbrowser,
msilib, ossaudiodev, xml_dom

- Eliminates all runtime genConst wrapper functions in module files
- All module handlers now use comptime function generators
- Uses genI32/genU8/genI64 helpers for numeric constants
- Total reduction: 9421 → 9228 lines (193 lines saved this batch)
